trains.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 12 to 16 minutes to Central station off-peak.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Indooroopilly via Moggill Road, Coonan Street, and the Walter Taylor Bridge corridor.

driving.motorway_access: Western Freeway access for CBD and Ipswich.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 12 to 16 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

secondary_state.name: Indooroopilly State High School
secondary_state.note: One of the most sought-after secondary catchments in inner west Brisbane.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Indooroopilly Shopping Centre is one of the largest shopping centres in inner Brisbane with full-line retail, supermarkets, dining, and cinema. Multiple cafe clusters along Stamford Road and Coonan Street.

pockets.name: Indooroopilly State High catchment streets
pockets.character: The catchment is the central buyer driver. Streets within the catchment carry a clear premium.

pockets.name: Riverside / Witton precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to the river and the Witton Barracks redevelopment.

pockets.name: Shopping centre area
pockets.character: Mix of apartment and townhouse stock close to the centre.

buyer_profile.note: Indooroopilly State High catchment access is a major buyer driver.
UQ St Lucia is within walking or cycling distance via the Walter Taylor Bridge for parts of Indooroopilly.
First home buyers and downsizers attracted to the apartment market close to the train and shopping centre.

verify_flags: Indooroopilly State High catchment exact boundary
